<script setup lang="ts">
import { Field } from "@/ui/field"
import { Input } from "@/ui/input"
import { Label } from "@/ui/label"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Disabled">
    <Field :data-disabled="true">
      <Label html-for="label-demo-disabled"> Disabled </Label>
      <Input id="label-demo-disabled" placeholder="Disabled" disabled />
    </Field>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import LabelDisabled from "@/examples/label/LabelDisabled.vue"
import LabelWithCheckbox from "@/examples/label/LabelWithCheckbox.vue"
import LabelWithInput from "@/examples/label/LabelWithInput.vue"
import LabelWithTextarea from "@/examples/label/LabelWithTextarea.vue"

import { ExampleWrapper } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <ExampleWrapper>
    <LabelWithCheckbox />
    <LabelWithInput />
    <LabelDisabled />
    <LabelWithTextarea />
  </ExampleWrapper>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Checkbox } from "@/ui/checkbox"
import { Field } from "@/ui/field"
import { Label } from "@/ui/label"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="With Checkbox">
    <Field orientation="horizontal">
      <Checkbox id="label-demo-terms" />
      <Label html-for="label-demo-terms"> Accept terms and conditions </Label>
    </Field>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Field } from "@/ui/field"
import { Input } from "@/ui/input"
import { Label } from "@/ui/label"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="With Input">
    <Field>
      <Label html-for="label-demo-username">Username</Label>
      <Input id="label-demo-username" placeholder="Username" />
    </Field>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Field } from "@/ui/field"
import { Label } from "@/ui/label"
import { Textarea } from "@/ui/textarea"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="With Textarea">
    <Field>
      <Label html-for="label-demo-message"> Message </Label>
      <Textarea id="label-demo-message" placeholder="Message" />
    </Field>
  </Example>
</template>
